evidence_quotes.quote: video game publisher ability to retroactively take back a product you've paid for by ending its service with no end of service plan
I believe its unfair for the video game publishers to take away a product you have paid for without giving the tools to continue playing the games that shut down

paragraphs.text: Dear EU I voice my concern for the current state of video game publisher ability to retroactively take back a product you've paid for by ending its service with no end of service plan on the subject of the Digital Fairness Act. I believe its unfair for the video game publishers to take away a product you have paid for without giving the tools to continue playing the games that shut down. Numerous Titles have already gone away, I myself have lost access to games I have paid for or spent money on, to name a few Shattered Skies and Nosgoth. You may be aware that the stop killing games initiative has gained traction recently and in the light of the current way things are playing out, I hope you will Judge things Fairly. From the way things seems at the moment Video Games Europe is Misunderstanding the Petition and a making possible lies to smear the initiative. Over a million citizens are in agreement that this practice is unfair I voice my concern as a Citizen of Europe, I know the Digital Fairness Act doesn't directly include this, But I think its related Regards
